disclaimer: Structural audit-only. Does not constitute investment advice. No guaranteed profit, guaranteed return, risk-free claims. Results must not be used as buy/sell/hold signals.

schemaReleaseDateFields.releaseDate: DateTime? — P17 PIT gate field, NEVER written by sync

repairStrategyRationale: TWSE API does not provide explicit releaseDate or announcementDate. Taiwan regulatory rule: monthly revenue must be released by the 10th of the following month. Using deterministic conservative fallback: releaseDate = next-month-10th (UTC midnight), releaseDateSource = INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH, releaseDateConfidence = LOW.
pitSafetyGuarantee: Next-month-10th is always AFTER the last day of the revenue month. No lookahead possible.

existingInfrastructure.purpose: Same NEXT_MONTH_10TH inference logic — dry-run only, dryRunOnly=true, productionWriteAllowed=false
PIT gate reads releaseDate — already handles allowInferredReleaseDate=true fallback
Mapping contract — releaseDate is the sole PIT gate field, entersAlphaScore=false
